mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_inbound_order ( order_no, source_no, order_type, supplier_name, contact_person, contact_phone, total_quantity, actual_quantity, order_status, plan_time, remark, dr, create_by, update_by ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{sourceNo}, #{orderType}, #{supplierName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{totalQuantity}, #{actualQuantity}, #{orderStatus}, #{planTime}, #{remark}, 0, #{createBy}, #{updateBy} )

INSERT INTO wms_inbound_order_detail ( order_id, model_id, model_code, model_name, batch_no, suggested_bin_code, planned_quantity, actual_quantity, detail_status, dr ) VALUES
( #{d.orderId}, #{d.modelId}, #{d.modelCode}, #{d.modelName}, #{d.batchNo}, #{d.suggestedBinCode}, #{d.plannedQuantity}, 0, 0, 0 )
